choices.text: Can: censor txs, reorganize recent blocks (double-spend), empty mempool. Cannot: steal others' coins, change 21M cap, reverse confirmed deep history. Economically prohibitive on Bitcoin (~$10B+); smaller chains (BCH/ETC) attacked regularly.
Phishing > lost keys > exchange hacks > software bugs >>> 51% > quantum. Daily threats are scams + key loss. Focus security on real-world common attacks; protocol attacks economically prohibitive.

questions.explanation: Phishing + key loss vastly more likely than protocol attacks.
